channel.title: tech on Ivan's Homepage
channel.description: Recent content in tech on Ivan's Homepage

item.title: How to install and configure Hugo with GitHub Pages on Ubuntu Desktop
item.description: What is Hugo? Hugo is a fast and easy-to-use static site generator written in Go and available across multiple platforms. Static site generators is a great choice for blogs and other use cases when you are not required to pull dynamic content from a database. Where it can be used? During preparation lurking for this article I stumbled into DigitalOcean's tutorial on Hugo from 2015 year.
